questions.subject: Science
questions.prompt:
Consider the following statements regarding 'Project Waterworth', recently seen in the news:
1. It is the world's longest subsea cable project initiated by Meta.
2. It is designed to connect all seven continents using fiber-optic technology.
3. Its designated landing sites in India are located on both the western and eastern coasts.

How many of the above statements are correct?
questions.explanation: Statement 1 is correct: Project Waterworth is the world's longest subsea cable project, initiated by Meta. Statement 2 is incorrect: It is designed to connect five major continents, not all seven. Statement 3 is correct: The selected landing sites in India are Mumbai (western coast) and Visakhapatnam (eastern coast).
questions.takeaway: Project Waterworth is Meta's subsea fiber-optic cable project connecting five continents, with Indian landing sites in Mumbai and Visakhapatnam.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Meta has selected Mumbai and Visakhapatnam as the landing sites for the undersea cable project, Waterworth. It will connect five major continents. It is the world’s longest subsea cable project.

questions.subject: Science
questions.prompt:
With reference to international communication infrastructure, consider the following statements:
1. The backbone of the international internet is formed by fiber-optic cables laid across the ocean floor.
2. Meta's Project Waterworth establishes its Indian landing sites exclusively on the eastern coast of India.

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: Statement 1 is correct: Undersea fiber-optic cables transmit information and enable worldwide communications, acting as the backbone of the international internet. Statement 2 is incorrect: Project Waterworth has selected both Mumbai (western coast) and Visakhapatnam (eastern coast) as its landing sites in India.
questions.takeaway: Undersea fiber-optic cables are the primary infrastructure for global internet connectivity. Project Waterworth utilizes both the eastern and western coasts of India for its landing sites.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Meta has selected Mumbai and Visakhapatnam as the landing sites for the undersea cable project, Waterworth... Undersea cables are fiber-optic cable laid across the ocean floor that transmits information and enables worldwide communications. Significance: Undersea cables are backbone of international internet.
